task: motion-0015: implement deterministic panel selection runner (compute totals + winner from breakdown scores; write selection.json safely)
winner_rationale: Winner selected by deterministic max-total rule after applying rubric weights to breakdown scores (0–10) and scaling to a 0–100 total.
SLOT_BUILDER_01 is the only slot with nonzero scores (correctness=8, compilable=7), producing total=38; all other slots remain unscored (total=0).
No tie-break was required (unique highest total).

reservations.reservation: Partial scoring: only SLOT_BUILDER_01 has nonzero breakdown values; selection reflects current inputs rather than a full comparative evaluation.
mitigation: Score at least one additional slot across the same criteria to validate that SLOT_BUILDER_01 remains the highest-total option.
If future scoring changes the winner, update winner_rationale and record why the decision changed.
reservations.what_to_watch: If additional slots are scored later and totals change materially, confirm the recompute step was run and the winner remains stable under the same rubric.
